Services

What we deliver

End to end, or just the part you're stuck on. We work directly with integrators, consultants and end clients.

Control system programming

Source routing, room logic, scheduling, presets and macros built around real-world use.

Audio DSP programming

Gain structure, mix-minus, AEC and automixing tuned for clear, feedback-free audio.

Touch panel & UCI design

Interfaces a guest can drive without a manual — clean layouts on every platform and tablets.

Commissioning & tuning

Load on site or remotely, test every signal path, verify control and tune audio before sign-off.

Remote support & fixes

Remote diagnostics and updates to resolve a glitchy room fast — often without another truck roll.

Integration & drivers

Lighting, shades, VC platforms and third-party gear tied together with reliable custom drivers.

How we work

From drawings to a room that just works

01

Scope

Review drawings, signal flow and the functional spec so the program matches the room.

02

Program

Write and structure clean, documented control and DSP code in the native platform.

03

Commission

Load on site or remotely, test every path, and tune audio until it's signed off.

04

Support

Hand over documentation, then stay on call for updates as the room changes.

Why Shalom Pro

Code you can hand to the next person.

01

Platform-agnostic

One partner for every brand on the rack — no juggling separate specialists per system.

02

Maintainable by design

Commented, well-structured, version-controlled programs the next tech can actually read.

03

Remote-ready

Secure remote commissioning and support to cut downtime and unnecessary site visits.

04

Built for integrators

White-label work, clear hand-offs, and turnaround that respects your install deadline.

room_logic.lua
-- combinable boardroom A/B
function Room.combine(state)
  if state == "open" then
    DSP.link("A", "B")
    UI.show("combined")
  else
    DSP.split()
  end
end
-- AEC + automix verified
